testName: ICAO V2 Multichoice Pre-Solo Listening Test 5

questions.question: TGE has called at the Runup bay J for a flight to the Western Training area
options: Cross threshold runway 26R, holding point B4, runway 21R, TGE
Threshold runway 26R, holding point B4 runway 21R, TGE
Enter threshold runway 26R, B4, runway 21R, TGE

questions.question: LIE has called from runup bay F, for a flight to the western Training area
The pilot of YKB wants to return to FTA Apron after landing on 21 Right
options: Cross undershoots runways 26L and R, FTA apron, YKB
Cross undershoot runway 26L, FTA apron, YKB
Cross thresholds runways 26L and R, FTA apron, YKB
Cross undershoots runways 26R and L, FTA apron, YKB

questions.question: YTV has called at the Runup bay J for circuits
options: Give way to the Twinstar, holding point F, 21L, YTV
Give way to the Twinstar, holding point F, runway 21L, YTV
Runup bay J, holding point F, runway 21L, YTV

questions.question: Where is the traffic, YTV has to give way to?
The pilot of USP wants to return to the southern apron after landing on 21 Right.
options: Cross undershoot runway 26L, cross threshold runway 26R, USP
Cross undershoot runway 26L, cross threshold runway 26R, FTA apron, USP
Cross undershoot runway 26R and threshold runway 26R, USP
Cross threshold runway 26R, cross undershoot runway 26L, USP

questions.question: The pilot of YBU has called at the Runup bay J for a flight to the western Training area
options: Give way to the Grob, enter holding point B5, runway 21R, YBU
Give way to the Grob, cross undershoot runway 26R, holding point B5, runway 21R, YBU
Give way to the Grob, enter undershoot runway 26R, holding point B5, runway 21R, YBU
Enter undershoot runway 26R, holding point B5, runway 21R, YBU

questions.question: What is the colour and type of the traffic YBU has to follow?

sections.description: In this section the Tower controller is answering 'Ready' calls. Listen to the call and choose the response you would give.

questions.question: You are the pilot of YTC and are at the 03R hold point for a flight...
options: Runway 03R, cleared for take off, YTC
Cleared for take off, runway 03R, YTC
Follow the traffic, 03R, cleared for take off, YTC

questions.question: What is the traffic?
Where is the traffic?
What is the traffic's intention?
You are the pilot of Tango Golf November and are at the 03L hold point.
options: Behind the Cessna lining up, TGN
Lining up behind the Cessna, TGN
Traffic in sight, lining up, TGN
Behind the Cessna, lining up behind, TGN

questions.question: You are the pilot of Juliet Echo Sierra, and are at the 21R hold point.
options: Lining up for rolling start, JES
Runway 21R, lining up for rolling start, JES
Runway 21R, lining up, keep it rolling, JES

questions.question: You are the pilot of YTO and are at the 21L hold point and have requested a delay on the runway.
options: Lining up, delay approved, 10 seconds, YTO
Delay approved no longer than 10 seconds, lining up, YTO
Delay for 10 seconds, lining up, YTO

questions.question: You are the pilot of Yankee Tango Whisky and are at the 26L hold point.
options: Maintain runway heading, runway 26L, cleared for takeoff, YTW
Maintain runway heading, cleared for takeoff, YTW
Cleared for takeoff, runway 26 left, maintain runway heading, YTW

questions.question: You are the pilot of YTC and are at the 03R hold point.

sections.description: In this section the Tower Controller is answering 'Downwind' calls. The pilots are making their downwind call turning downwind. Select the letter of the diagram which best explains the instruction. (Diagram-based section - visual matching required with audio)

sections.sectionName: SECTION FOUR: TRAFFIC CALLS IN THE CIRCUIT OR ON APPROACH
sections.description: In this section the Tower Controller is giving traffic information. Choose the response you would give and select the letter of the diagram which best explains the instruction.

questions.question: You are the pilot of YTC.
options: Traffic in sight, cleared to land, YTC

sections.description: In this section the Tower Controller is giving an aircraft an instruction for a change of runway. Choose the response you would give and select the letter of the diagram which best explains the instruction.

questions.question: You are the pilot of Yankee Tango Bravo. You are inbound from the Training Area for circuit practice and are on base for 03L when you receive this call.
options: Runway 03L, cleared touch and go, right circuits runway 03R, YTB.
Runway 03L cleared touch and go, right turn right circuits, runway 03R, YTB.
Cleared touch and go, right turn for runway R, right circuits, YTB.
Cleared touch and go, right turn for runway 03R, right circuits, YTB.

questions.question: You are the pilot of Tango Golf Alpha. You have been doing circuits on 03R and have requested a Full stop landing, when you receive this call.
options: Through final for runway 03L, cleared to land, TGA
Through final runway 03L, cleared to land, TGA
Runway 03L cleared to land, roll through, TGA
Through final for runway 03L cleared to land, roll through, TGA

questions.question: You are the pilot of Yankee Tango Bravo. You are doing circuits on 21L and are on the base leg, when you receive this call.
options: When ready, right crosswind runway 03R, YTB
When ready, make right turn for change of runway 03R, YTB
When ready, right turn, runway 03R, YTB
When ready, right turn, right crosswind, runway 03R, YTB

sections.description: In this section the Tower Controller is telling approaching aircraft where to join the circuit. Choose the response you would give and select the letter of the diagram which best explains the instruction.

questions.question: Yankee Tango Whisky is inbound from the Training area. The Duty runway is Runway 21.
options: Cleared visual approach, track for right base, YTW
Cleared visual approach, direct right base, YTW

questions.question: Yankee Tango India has been told to join base for runway 03 left. The Duty runway is Runway 03.
Yankee Tango Kilo is inbound from Outer Harbor. The Duty runway is Runway 21.
options: Follow the Tobago, mid downwind runway 21R, maintain 1500, YTK
Maintain 1500, direct mid downwind runway 21R, YTK

questions.question: Juliet Victor Sierra is inbound from Outer Harbor.

sections.sectionName: SECTION SEVEN: OTHER CALLS IN THE CIRCUIT OR ON APPROACH
sections.description: In this section the Tower Controller is either giving instructions or requesting information. Listen and choose the response you would give.

questions.question: TAN is inbound for 03L when the pilot receives this call.
options: Report approaching wide left base, TAN

questions.question: KTB is on the downwind leg for 21R, when the pilot receives this call.
KTB is on the downwind leg for 21R, when the pilot receives this call.
options: Report ready to turn base, KTB

questions.question: BEG has been instructed to continue downwind, when the pilot receives this call.
options: Request an early base turn, BEG

questions.question: Parafield Ground is calling TGX - a taxiing aircraft.
YTQ is outbound to the Training area.
YTB is inbound and has requested circuits.
options: YTB, negative for the training area

questions.question: YTF has called ready for a flight to the Western training area.
YTO has reported at Outer Harbor and is inbound.
JAZ is departing the circuit for the Training area.

notes.important: Because this is an aviation listening comprehension test, the correct answers depend entirely on the accompanying audio tracks. Correct answers have been added for all available questions.
notes.sections3and4: Sections 3 requires diagram-based visual matching which is not included in this transcription.
notes.audioRequired: Audio tracks are essential for completing this test accurately.
